summary: Completed testing for NT Commerce Iteration 54: System Errors API (6 endpoints tested), System Alerts Section (connected to real API), and POS Shortcuts (right-click edit, color selection, localStorage persistence). All features working as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: System Errors API is well-structured with proper super admin authentication
Maintenance actions are simulated but log to DB correctly
POS shortcuts properly use localStorage for persistence
Color selection grid provides 20 color options
seed_data_creation: Created test errors via API during testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: System errors API at /api/saas/system-errors requires super_admin Bearer token. POS shortcuts stored in localStorage key 'posProductShortcuts'. Maintenance actions are simulated but create info-level log entries in system_errors collection.

GET_system_errors.details: Returns errors list with stats (total, critical, warning, info, resolved, today, active)

GET_with_filters.details: status=active and severity=critical filters work correctly

POST_create_error.details: Creates new error with type, severity, message, tenant info, auto_fixable flag

POST_auto_fix.details: Executes fix action and marks error as resolved

POST_manual_resolve.details: Marks error as resolved with optional notes

DELETE_clear_resolved.details: Clears all resolved errors, returns deleted_count

POST_maintenance_actions.details: All 4 maintenance actions work, return simulated results and log to DB

stats_cards.details: Shows real counts: total, critical, warning, info, resolved, today. Dynamic updates after actions.

error_list.details: Shows real errors from API with type badges, severity icons, timestamps, tenant names

auto_fix_button.details: Calls API and updates error status to resolved, shows toast notification

manual_resolve_button.details: Calls API to mark as resolved, shows 'تم وضع علامة محلول' toast

maintenance_buttons.details: All 4 buttons (مسح الكاش, إعادة اتصال DB, إعادة تشغيل, فحص النظام) call APIs and show toast with results

auto_fix_toggle.details: إصلاح تلقائي toggle controls visibility of auto-fix buttons

export_logs.details: تصدير السجل button generates log file download

clear_resolved.details: مسح المحلولة button calls DELETE /resolved API

shortcut_boxes.details: 18 shortcut boxes visible in اختصارات section on right side of POS

product_dropdown.details: Product selection dropdown shows available products

color_selection.details: 20 color options in 4x5 grid, selected color shows ring indicator

clear_button.details: مسح button clears shortcut from box
